name: researchhub
description: The easiest way for students to publish and showcase research, projects, and technical articles.

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @researchhub/web && npm run build --workspace @researchhub/api
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace @researchhub/web && npm run lint --workspace @researchhub/api
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @researchhub/web && npm run typecheck --workspace @researchhub/api
